# This file was generated by the YaTool build system (https://github.com/yandex/yatool),
# from a source YaTool build configuration provided in ya.make files.
#
# If the repository supports both CMake and ya build configurations, please modify both of them.
#
# If only CMake build configuration is supported then modify only CMake files and note that only
# simple modifications are allowed like adding source-files to targets or adding simple properties
# like target_include_directories. These modifications will be ported to original ya.make files
# by maintainers. Any complex modifications which can't be easily ported back to the ya build
# system may be rejected.
#
# Please refer to the build instructions in the repository for more information about manual
# changes in this file.

find_package(linux-headers-generic REQUIRED)

find_package(Python3 REQUIRED)

add_subdirectory(unittests)

add_library(lib-nbd-journal)


target_compile_options(lib-nbd-journal PRIVATE
  -Wdeprecated-this-capture
  -Wimplicit-fallthrough
  -Wparentheses
  -Wno-logical-op-parentheses
  -Wno-bitwise-op-parentheses
  -Wswitch
  -Wreturn-type
)

target_link_libraries(lib-nbd-journal PUBLIC
  linux-headers-generic::linux-headers-generic
  contrib-libs-cxxsupp
  yutil
  yt-yt-client
  server-lib-nbd
  yt-yt-ytlib
  library-query-engine
)

target_sources(lib-nbd-journal PRIVATE
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/server/lib/nbd/journal/block_flusher.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/server/lib/nbd/journal/block_map.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/server/lib/nbd/journal/block_store.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/server/lib/nbd/journal/config.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/server/lib/nbd/journal/block_store_helpers.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/server/lib/nbd/journal/dirty_block_pool.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/server/lib/nbd/journal/journal_block_device.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/server/lib/nbd/journal/snapshot_reader.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/server/lib/nbd/journal/snapshot_writer.cpp
  ${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}/yt/yt/server/lib/nbd/journal/records/snapshot_block.record.cpp
  ${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}/yt/yt/server/lib/nbd/journal/records/snapshot_block.record.h
)


add_custom_command(
  OUTPUT
  ${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}/yt/yt/server/lib/nbd/journal/records/snapshot_block.record.cpp
  ${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}/yt/yt/server/lib/nbd/journal/records/snapshot_block.record.h
  DEPENDS
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/server/lib/nbd/journal/records/snapshot_block.yaml
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/tools/record_codegen/yt_record_codegen/__init__.py
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/tools/record_codegen/yt_record_codegen/templates/cpp.j2
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/tools/record_codegen/yt_record_codegen/templates/h.j2
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/tools/record_codegen/yt_record_codegen/lib/__init__.py
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/tools/record_codegen/yt_record_codegen/bin/__main__.py
  WORKING_DIRECTORY
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/tools/record_codegen
  COMMAND
  ${Python3_EXECUTABLE}
  -B
  -m
  yt_record_codegen.bin
  --input
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/server/lib/nbd/journal/records/snapshot_block.yaml
  --output-root
  ${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}
  --output-cpp
  ${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}/yt/yt/server/lib/nbd/journal/records/snapshot_block.record.cpp
)
